message: Overdue purchase order summary retrieved successfully.

notes: The source CSV does not contain column headers.
Columns 10 and 11 contain counts of 2102 and 1819, but their business definitions cannot be determined reliably from the values alone.
Those two fields are preserved as supplementalCounts using their original source-column positions.
Currency conversion coverage is 100 percent and no overdue purchase orders are unconverted.
